narrative:
Precinct Jefferson/Madison (precinct in Guernsey County) has 665 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.3 percentage points.
